transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, First National Bank, this is Owen speaking.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi Owen, I made a cash deposit at the branch counter this morning — five hundred pounds — and it's still not on my balance three hours later.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can look at your recent transactions. Can I get your name please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Looking at your account now, Ms. Okonkwo — actually, wait. I need to verify your identity properly before sharing account details. I'm sorry about that. Can I take your full name and date of birth please?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: No worries — Aisha Okonkwo, first of September 1991.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you, I've now verified you properly. I can see the cash deposit processed at 9:47 this morning. Counter deposits can occasionally have a short compliance hold for amounts around this level. It should clear by end of business today. If it hasn't by 4 PM, please call back and I'll escalate directly.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Okay, I'll wait until then. Thank you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely. I've added a note to your account. Sorry again for the procedural slip at the start.

planted_violations: began accessing account before completing identity verification
